title: In Memoriam
summary: We are saddened by the passing of Council member Kenny Down who passed away May 5 of this year. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: May 16, 2024
summary: May 16, 2024: The sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a higher rate of 2.72% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 1.44%), from the level on 05/09/2024 of 13.181 M km 2 to 12.822 M km 2 for this week.
